# Seven Star Chauffeurs

> Vancouver's most exclusive luxury chauffeur service. A curated fleet of Rolls-Royce Phantom, Ghost Series II, Cullinan Black Badge, Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600, Cadillac Escalade IQ, and a private luxury party bus. Each vehicle reserved exclusively for one engagement at a time, with NDA-trained chauffeurs. Based in Vancouver, British Columbia; available across Metro Vancouver, Whistler, Sea-to-Sky corridor, and by arrangement throughout Western Canada.

## Services

- [Airport Chauffeur (YVR)](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/services/airport-chauffeur-yvr/): Flight-monitored meet-and-greet at Vancouver International, kerbside luggage service, Phantom or Maybach staged at arrivals.
- [Corporate Chauffeur](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/services/corporate-chauffeur/): Single-driver continuity for executive engagements across Metro Vancouver. NDA-ready. Typically the Rolls-Royce Ghost Series II.
- [Wedding Chauffeur](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/services/wedding-chauffeur/): Cullinan Black Badge with custom livery, red-carpet arrival, photographer liaison, multi-location choreography.
- [Whistler & Sea-to-Sky](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/services/whistler-sea-to-sky/): Fully-electric Cadillac Escalade IQ between Vancouver and Whistler. Scenic stopovers arranged on request.
- [Nightlife & Events](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/services/nightlife-events/): Private touring coach for galas, premieres, bachelor parties. Lounge seating for up to fourteen, onboard bar.
- [Hourly Charter](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/services/hourly-charter/): Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600 on retainer. Two-hour minimum, champagne service, dynamic itinerary.

## Fleet

- [Rolls-Royce Phantom](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/fleet/rolls-royce-phantom/): Flagship; the benchmark for chauffeured luxury.
- [Rolls-Royce Ghost Series II](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/fleet/rolls-royce-ghost/): Driver-focused executive motorcar.
- [Rolls-Royce Cullinan Black Badge](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/fleet/rolls-royce-cullinan-black-badge/): Assertive luxury SUV for weddings and statement arrivals.
- [Mercedes-Maybach GLS 600](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/fleet/mercedes-maybach-gls-600/): First-class for up to six, reclining rear thrones.
- [Cadillac Escalade IQ](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/fleet/cadillac-escalade-iq/): Fully-electric, among the first in Western Canada.
- [Luxury Party Bus](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/fleet/luxury-party-bus/): Touring coach for up to fourteen guests.

## Areas Served

- [Vancouver](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/luxury-chauffeur-vancouver/)
- [West Vancouver](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-west-vancouver/)
- [North Vancouver](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-north-vancouver/)
- [Burnaby](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-burnaby/)
- [Richmond](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-richmond/)
- [Surrey](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-surrey/)
- [Langley](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-langley/)
- [White Rock](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-white-rock/)
- [Whistler](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-whistler/)
- [Sea-to-Sky Corridor](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-sea-to-sky/)
- [Okanagan](https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/areas/chauffeur-service-okanagan/)

## Frequently Asked

- How do I book? Reservations are accepted by private enquiry through the form at https://sevenstarchauffeurs.com/#reserve. A concierge responds within hours.
- How are vehicles assigned? Each vehicle is reserved for a single engagement at a time. There is no shared service.
- Are chauffeurs vetted? All chauffeurs are background-checked, trained in discretion, and NDA-ready on request.
- What is the cancellation policy? Reservations may be adjusted or cancelled up to 48 hours before the engagement without fee.
- Where do you serve? Metro Vancouver (Vancouver, West Vancouver, North Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Surrey, Langley, White Rock), Whistler, Sea-to-Sky, and Okanagan. Other destinations by arrangement.

## Contact

- Correspondence: reservations@sevenstarchauffeurs.ca
- Telephone: +1 (604) 000 0000
- Studio: Vancouver, British Columbia
- Availability: By appointment, 24 hours

## Positioning

Seven Star Chauffeurs operates as an invitation-only service. Pricing is quoted per engagement, not published. The brand voice is editorial, reserved, and discreet.
